description_long: This vehicle is a futuristic, heavily stylized combat craft with a sleek, angular fuselage and four elongated wings extending outward in an X-formation. The body is predominantly black with striking orange streaks and weathered markings, giving it a battle-worn appearance. Each wing is equipped with a cylindrical engine pod and what appear to be weapon mounts at the tips, suggesting high maneuverability and offensive capability. The cockpit is centrally located and streamlined, likely designed for a single pilot, with reinforced panels and minimal external windows. The undercarriage and rear sections are compact, with visible mechanical details and no traditional wheels or landing gear. The overall design is reminiscent of advanced aerial or space combat vehicles, optimized for speed, agility, and tactical engagements.
description: A black and orange, X-winged combat vehicle with weapon mounts on each wing and a streamlined, armored cockpit. Its angular, futuristic design suggests high maneuverability and offensive capability.
description_view_0: Front view shows the pointed nose, central cockpit, and the symmetrical X-formation of the four wings with weapon mounts at the tips.
description_view_1: Side view highlights the elongated fuselage, the slim profile of the wings, and the cylindrical engine pods attached to each wing.
description_view_2: Rear view reveals the twin engine exhausts, the angular tail section, and the full span of the wings extending outward.
description_view_3: Opposite side view mirrors view 1, showing the other side of the fuselage and wing structure, with visible weapon mounts and engine pods.
attribute_weapon_mounts: Four visible weapon mounts, one at the tip of each wing, likely for energy or projectile weapons.
attribute_armor_plating: Full body appears to be covered in angular, reinforced armor plating with a moderate thickness, especially around the cockpit and fuselage.
attribute_camouflage_pattern: Black base with irregular orange streaks and weathered markings, forming a unique, high-contrast paint scheme.
